commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds configured model choices to the shared `/model` argument menu, filters them through the allowed model catalog, and updates Discord dispatch/tests to preserve its dedicated bare `/model` picker.

PR surface: Source +52, Tests +172. Total +224 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: PR head adds a shared `/model` argsMenu, while Telegram resolves shared command menus before command dispatch and serializes each choice into raw `tgcmd:/model ...` callback data. I did not run a live Telegram workspace or tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The repair is narrow, but the PR is explicitly labeled `clawsweeper:human-review`, so a maintainer should clear that signal or direct the repair lane before automerge continues.

target.title: feat: add model switch choices to /model
